description: Explore the world of spices and learn how to use them to enhance flavor in your dishes.

steps.instruction: Familiarize yourself with common spices and their flavor profiles.
Toast whole spices in a dry pan to release their essential oils and enhance flavor.
Experiment with different spice combinations in your dishes to find your preferred flavors.
Learn how to balance spices with acidity and sweetness for well-rounded dishes.

safety_notes: Be cautious with spicy ingredients; adjust to your heat tolerance.
Store spices in a cool, dark place to maintain their potency.
